title: Control-plane patch ingest failure
steps: Check recent deployment and payload schema changes.
Compare failed work request payload with the latest accepted schema.
Pause rollout if failure rate continues above threshold.
Replay one failed payload in staging before production retry.

title: Storage scale-up safety gate
steps: Verify tenancy allowlist and operator permission state.
Refresh upstream metadata and compare dashboard freshness.
Confirm safety gate reason before manual override.
Attach validation logs to the support ticket.

title: Runbook search latency
steps: Check cache hit ratio and index query latency.
Use fallback keyword retrieval if vector retrieval times out.
Scale triage-agent workers if sustained latency continues.
